name: Hunan Haili Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Haili Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and trades in pesticides and fine chemicals in China. The company offers insecticides, fungicides, phosgene derivatives, intermediates, amino-protecting agents, special chemicals, formulations, and seed coating agents under the Haili brand. It is also involved in the transportation of dangerous chemicals; and installation of chemical facilities. The company is based in Changsha, China.
